description: Design decision logger — hooks into Bridge's fix workflow to turn Figma corrections into ADRs in docs/decisions/.
notes: This agent is triggered by a Bridge fix diff, not invoked directly by the user.
See docs/workflows/bridge-fix-loop.md for the fix-loop integration specification.
No figma-cli or Figma API token required — input is a text diff from Bridge.
